svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD
 A[Markdown Input] --> B[Parse Markdown]
 B --> C{Contains Math?}
 C -->|Yes| D[Render KaTeX]
 C -->|No| E[Skip KaTeX]
 D --> F[Display Content]
 E --> F
 B --> G{Contains Diagrams?}
 G -->|Yes| H[Render Mermaid]
 G -->|No| I[Skip Mermaid]
 H --> F
 I --> F
","style":"notebook"}
